title: hieracium murorum subsp. ovalifrons
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. ovalifrons is a subspecies of plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) commonly known as a type of hawkweed. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, due to its potential to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of conditions like gastritis and colic. In herbal preparations, Hieracium murorum subsp. ovalifrons is often used as a tea or tincture, and it may also be applied topically as a poultice to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
